category_sources: Official Icecast download page describes libshout as a library for writing Icecast source clients.
source_facts.description: Data and connectivity library for the Icecast server.
display_name_sources: Official Icecast download page uses the name libshout.
docs_sources: Official Icecast docs provide libshout documentation.
Official Icecast download page documents libshout release and purpose.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Xiph/Icecast git workflow lists libshout at https://gitlab.xiph.org/xiph/icecast-libshout.git.
tags_sources: Official Icecast download page says libshout is used to write a source client.
